title: Youth
description: Youth (2026) is a Tamil-language romantic comedy-drama released on March 19, 2026, directed by and starring Ken Karunas. The film follows Praveen on a quest for love during his 10th-grade school days. It is a coming-of-age story about a teenager trying to find true love.

title: RRR
description: Set in the 1920s during the British Raj in India, the film is a fictionalized tale based on two real-life Indian revolutionaries: Alluri Sitarama Raju (played by Ram Charan) and Komaram Bheem (played by Jr. NTR). The story explores a scenario where these two freedom fighters, who never actually met in real life, cross paths and form a deep friendship, unaware of each other's true identities or ultimate goals. Raju, a cop working for the British, and Bheem, a tribal leader aiming to rescue a kidnapped girl, eventually align in a spectacular battle against the British Empire

title: Kannappa
description: An Indian Telugu-language pan-India epic film based on the Hindu legend of Kannappa, a fierce tribal hunter and fervent devotee of Lord Shiva who sacrifices his own eyes to prove his devotion. The film follows his journey from an skeptic warrior to a legendary saint.

title: Naa Peru Surya, Naa Illu India

title: Raja Saab
description: The film is written and directed by Maruthi, known for his work in the horror-comedy genre. It is his first collaboration with Prabhas.
